[650CR] Exide 650CR Car Battery | P.O.A | 93Ah | 790 CCA
Description: The Exide 650CR Car Battery is a maintenance-free 12V battery with 93Ah capacity and 790 CCA. Case size: 303 x 174 x 220 mm. Built for dependable cranking power and everyday passenger vehicle use.

Description: The Exide 652C Car Battery is a maintenance-free 12V battery with 70Ah capacity and 567 CCA. Case size: 276 x 175 x 190 mm. Built for dependable cranking power and everyday passenger vehicle use.

[652CP] Exide 652CP Car Battery | P.O.A | 75Ah | 615 CCA
Description: The Exide 652CP Car Battery is a maintenance-free 12V battery with 75Ah capacity and 615 CCA. Case size: 276 x 175 x 190 mm. Built for dependable cranking power and everyday passenger vehicle use.
